mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_SALE_ORDER_ITEM (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_GOODS_ID, I_QTY_BASE, S_INPUT_UNIT, I_INPUT_QTY, I_PRICE, I_DISCOUNT, I_DISCOUNT_PRICE, S_REMARK, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sSaleId}, #{sGoodsId}, #{iQtyBase}, #{sInputUnit}, #{iInputQty}, #{iPrice}, #{iDiscount}, #{iDiscountPrice}, #{sRemark}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_SALE_ID, S_GOODS_ID, I_QTY_BASE, S_INPUT_UNIT, I_INPUT_QTY, I_PRICE, I_DISCOUNT, I_DISCOUNT_PRICE, S_REMARK, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SALE_ORDER_ITEM WHERE S_SALE_ID = #{saleId}
